    Index

    A C D E G H I L M N P R S T U V W 
    All Classes and Interfaces|All Packages|Serialized Form

    A

    addAttendee(Attendee) - Method in class planner.model.Event
    Adds an attendee to the event's attendee list.
    addAttendee(Event, String, String) - Method in class planner.controller.EventController
    Adds a single attendee to an event.
    addAttendeeToFutureOccurrences(RecurringEvent, String, String) - Method in class planner.controller.EventController
    Adds a single attendee to all future occurrences of a recurring event.
    assignLegacySeriesIds(List) - Static method in class planner.model.DataStorage
    Assigns shared series identifiers to recurring events loaded from legacy file formats.
    Attendee - Class in planner.model
    Attendee is an entity that represents an event participant.
    Attendee(String, String) - Constructor for class planner.model.Attendee
    Constructs an Attendee with the specified name and email address.
    attendees - Variable in class planner.model.Event
    The list of attendees participating in the event

    C

    calculateNextOccurrence() - Method in class planner.model.RecurringEvent
    Calculates the date and time of the next occurrence of this recurring event.
    CalendarPanel - Class in planner.view
    CalendarPanel is a custom JPanel that displays an interactive calendar view for event management.
    CalendarPanel(EventController) - Constructor for class planner.view.CalendarPanel
    Constructs a CalendarPanel with a reference to the EventController.
    CalendarPanel.ViewMode - Enum Class in planner.view
    Enum representing the three available calendar view modes.
    category - Variable in class planner.model.Event
    The category or classification of the event (e.g., "Meeting", "Birthday")
    category() - Method in record class planner.view.EventFormDialog.EventFormData
    Returns the value of the category record component.
    createEvent(String, LocalDateTime, String, String, String, int) - Method in class planner.controller.EventController
    Creates a new single (non-recurring) event and persists it to storage.
    createRecurringEvent(String, LocalDateTime, String, String, String, int, RecurringEvent.RecurrenceType, int) - Method in class planner.controller.EventController
    Creates a new recurring event with specified recurrence pattern and persists all occurrences to storage.

    D

    DAILY - Enum constant in enum class planner.model.RecurringEvent.RecurrenceType
    Event repeats every day
    DAILY - Enum constant in enum class planner.view.CalendarPanel.ViewMode
    Shows a single day with its events listed by hour
    DataStorage - Class in planner.model
    DataStorage is a component responsible for data persistence operations on disk (File I/O).
    DataStorage() - Constructor for class planner.model.DataStorage
    Default constructor for production use.
    DataStorage(String) - Constructor for class planner.model.DataStorage
    Constructor for Dependency Injection.
    dateTime - Variable in class planner.model.Event
    The date and time when the event occurs
    dateTime() - Method in record class planner.view.EventFormDialog.EventFormData
    Returns the value of the dateTime record component.
    deleteEvent(Event) - Method in class planner.controller.EventController
    Deletes a single event from the system.
    deleteFutureOccurrences(RecurringEvent) - Method in class planner.controller.EventController
    Deletes all future occurrences of a recurring event starting from a specified instance.
    description - Variable in class planner.model.Event
    A detailed description or notes about the event
    description() - Method in record class planner.view.EventFormDialog.EventFormData
    Returns the value of the description record component.

    E

    equals(Object) - Method in record class planner.view.EventFormDialog.EventFormData
    Indicates whether some other object is "equal to" this one.
    Event - Class in planner.model
    Event is the base domain model class representing an event in the calendar system.
    Event(String, LocalDateTime, String, String, String, int) - Constructor for class planner.model.Event
    Constructs an Event with the specified details.
    EventController - Class in planner.controller
    EventController manages all event-related operations including creation, updating, deletion, and retrieval of events.
    EventController() - Constructor for class planner.controller.EventController
    Constructs an EventController with default storage configuration.
    EventController(DataStorage) - Constructor for class planner.controller.EventController
    Constructs an EventController with a custom storage instance.
    EventFormData(String, LocalDateTime, String, String, String, int, RecurringEvent.RecurrenceType, int) - Constructor for record class planner.view.EventFormDialog.EventFormData
    Creates an instance of a EventFormData record class.
    EventFormDialog - Class in planner.view
    EventFormDialog is a reusable dialog component responsible for collecting event information from the user through a graphical form.
    EventFormDialog.EventFormData - Record Class in planner.view
    Immutable data transfer object (DTO) used to transport form values collected from the user interface.
    exportDayToFile(LocalDate, String) - Method in class planner.controller.EventController
    Exports all events for a specific day to a formatted text file.

    G

    getAllEvents() - Method in class planner.controller.EventController
    Retrieves a copy of all events currently stored in the system.
    getAttendees() - Method in class planner.model.Event
    Returns the list of attendees for this event.
    getCategory() - Method in class planner.model.Event
    Returns the event's category.
    getDatesWithEventsInMonth(int, int) - Method in class planner.controller.EventController
    Retrieves all distinct dates in a specific month that have at least one event.
    getDateTime() - Method in class planner.model.Event
    Returns the event's date and time.
    getDescription() - Method in class planner.model.Event
    Returns the event's description.
    getEmail() - Method in class planner.model.Attendee
    Returns the attendee's email address.
    getEventsForDate(LocalDate) - Method in class planner.controller.EventController
    Retrieves all events scheduled for a specific date.
    getFormattedDateTime() - Method in class planner.model.Event
    Returns the event's date and time in a user-friendly formatted string.
    getLocation() - Method in class planner.model.Event
    Returns the event's location.
    getName() - Method in class planner.model.Attendee
    Returns the attendee's name.
    getRecurrenceType() - Method in class planner.model.RecurringEvent
    Returns the recurrence type pattern for this recurring event.
    getReminderMinutesBefore() - Method in class planner.model.Event
    Returns the reminder time in minutes before the event.
    getSeriesId() - Method in class planner.model.RecurringEvent
    Returns the series identifier for this recurring event.
    getTitle() - Method in class planner.model.Event
    Returns the event's title.
    goToToday() - Method in class planner.view.CalendarPanel
    Navigates the calendar back to the current day and resets the view to MONTHLY.

    H

    hashCode() - Method in record class planner.view.EventFormDialog.EventFormData
    Returns a hash code value for this object.

    I

    InvalidEventException - Exception Class in planner.exception
    InvalidEventException is a custom checked exception thrown when an event operation violates validation rules or business logic constraints.
    InvalidEventException(String) - Constructor for exception class planner.exception.InvalidEventException
    Constructs an InvalidEventException with a descriptive error message.
    isRecurring() - Method in record class planner.view.EventFormDialog.EventFormData
    Checks whether this event has a recurrence type other than NONE.

    L

    loadEvents() - Method in class planner.model.DataStorage
    Reconstructs object-oriented event entities from the persisted text file.
    location - Variable in class planner.model.Event
    The location or venue of the event
    location() - Method in record class planner.view.EventFormDialog.EventFormData
    Returns the value of the location record component.

    M

    main(String[]) - Static method in class planner.Main
    Main method - the entry point of the Event Planner application.
    Main - Class in planner
    Main is the entry point for the Event Planner application.
    Main() - Constructor for class planner.Main
     
    MainFrame - Class in planner.view
    MainFrame is the primary user interface for the Event Planner application.
    MainFrame(EventController) - Constructor for class planner.view.MainFrame
    Constructs the main application window with all UI components.
    MONTHLY - Enum constant in enum class planner.model.RecurringEvent.RecurrenceType
    Event repeats every month on the same date
    MONTHLY - Enum constant in enum class planner.view.CalendarPanel.ViewMode
    Shows the entire month as a traditional calendar grid

    N

    NONE - Enum constant in enum class planner.model.RecurringEvent.RecurrenceType
    Event does not recur (single occurrence)

    P

    planner - package planner
     
    planner.controller - package planner.controller
     
    planner.exception - package planner.exception
     
    planner.model - package planner.model
     
    planner.view - package planner.view
     

    R

    recurrenceType() - Method in record class planner.view.EventFormDialog.EventFormData
    Returns the value of the recurrenceType record component.
    RecurringEvent - Class in planner.model
    RecurringEvent is a specialized domain model class that represents an event with recurring scheduling rules.
    RecurringEvent(String, LocalDateTime, String, String, String, int, RecurringEvent.RecurrenceType) - Constructor for class planner.model.RecurringEvent
    Constructs a RecurringEvent with automatic series identifier generation.
    RecurringEvent(String, LocalDateTime, String, String, String, int, RecurringEvent.RecurrenceType, String) - Constructor for class planner.model.RecurringEvent
    Constructs a RecurringEvent with an explicit series identifier.
    RecurringEvent.RecurrenceType - Enum Class in planner.model
    Enumeration representing the possible recurrence patterns for a recurring event.
    refresh() - Method in class planner.view.CalendarPanel
    Refreshes the entire calendar panel.
    reminderMinutes() - Method in record class planner.view.EventFormDialog.EventFormData
    Returns the value of the reminderMinutes record component.
    reminderMinutesBefore - Variable in class planner.model.Event
    The number of minutes before the event to trigger a reminder notification
    ReminderThread - Class in planner.controller
    ReminderThread is a background daemon thread that continuously monitors scheduled events and displays reminder notifications at the appropriate time before each event.
    ReminderThread(EventController) - Constructor for class planner.controller.ReminderThread
    Constructs a ReminderThread with a reference to the EventController.
    repetitions() - Method in record class planner.view.EventFormDialog.EventFormData
    Returns the value of the repetitions record component.
    run() - Method in class planner.controller.ReminderThread
    Main execution method of the reminder thread.

    S

    saveEvents(List) - Method in class planner.model.DataStorage
    Serializes the in-memory event list to the local file system.
    searchEvents(String) - Method in class planner.controller.EventController
    Searches for events matching a keyword in multiple fields.
    setCategory(String) - Method in class planner.model.Event
    Sets the event's category.
    setDateTime(LocalDateTime) - Method in class planner.model.Event
    Sets the event's date and time.
    setDescription(String) - Method in class planner.model.Event
    Sets the event's description.
    setEmail(String) - Method in class planner.model.Attendee
    Sets the attendee's email address.
    setLocation(String) - Method in class planner.model.Event
    Sets the event's location.
    setName(String) - Method in class planner.model.Attendee
    Sets the attendee's name.
    setOnDateClickCallback(Consumer) - Method in class planner.view.CalendarPanel
    Sets the callback function invoked when a date cell is clicked.
    setRecurrenceType(RecurringEvent.RecurrenceType) - Method in class planner.model.RecurringEvent
    Sets the recurrence type pattern for this recurring event.
    setReminderMinutesBefore(int) - Method in class planner.model.Event
    Sets the reminder time in minutes before the event.
    setSeriesId(String) - Method in class planner.model.RecurringEvent
    Sets the series identifier for this recurring event.
    setTitle(String) - Method in class planner.model.Event
    Sets the event's title.
    showCreateDialog(Component) - Static method in class planner.view.EventFormDialog
    Displays a dialog for creating a new event.
    showEditDialog(Component, Event) - Static method in class planner.view.EventFormDialog
    Displays a dialog for editing an existing event.
    stop_running() - Method in class planner.controller.ReminderThread
    Stops the reminder thread gracefully.

    T

    title - Variable in class planner.model.Event
    The title or name of the event
    title() - Method in record class planner.view.EventFormDialog.EventFormData
    Returns the value of the title record component.
    toCSV() - Method in class planner.model.Attendee
    Converts the attendee's information to a CSV-formatted string for file persistence.
    toCSV() - Method in class planner.model.Event
    Converts the event to a CSV (comma-separated values) format string for file persistence.
    toCSV() - Method in class planner.model.RecurringEvent
    Converts the recurring event to a CSV (comma-separated values) format string for file persistence.
    toString() - Method in class planner.model.Attendee
    Returns a string representation of the attendee for display purposes.
    toString() - Method in class planner.model.Event
    Returns a string representation of the event for display in the user interface.
    toString() - Method in record class planner.view.EventFormDialog.EventFormData
    Returns a string representation of this record class.

    U

    updateEvent(Event, String, LocalDateTime, String, String, String, int) - Method in class planner.controller.EventController
    Updates an existing single event with new information.
    updateFutureOccurrences(RecurringEvent, String, LocalDateTime, String, String, String, int) - Method in class planner.controller.EventController
    Updates all future occurrences of a recurring event starting from a specified instance.

    V

    valueOf(String) - Static method in enum class planner.model.RecurringEvent.RecurrenceType
    Returns the enum constant of this class with the specified name.
    valueOf(String) - Static method in enum class planner.view.CalendarPanel.ViewMode
    Returns the enum constant of this class with the specified name.
    values() - Static method in enum class planner.model.RecurringEvent.RecurrenceType
    Returns an array containing the constants of this enum class, in the order they are declared.
    values() - Static method in enum class planner.view.CalendarPanel.ViewMode
    Returns an array containing the constants of this enum class, in the order they are declared.

    W

    WEEKLY - Enum constant in enum class planner.model.RecurringEvent.RecurrenceType
    Event repeats every week on the same day
    WEEKLY - Enum constant in enum class planner.view.CalendarPanel.ViewMode
    Shows all seven days of the selected week
